signals.title: Western Festival at Dengri Eco Resorts
signals.reason: An outdoor, mountain-based festival featuring western themes and games, highly suitable for a family day trip in nature (~80 min drive).
signals.note: The venue 'Dengri Eco Resorts' in Velingrad appears to be a hallucination and cannot be verified.

signals.title: Disney Summer of Stories at the Singing Fountains
signals.when_text: Thursday, Friday, and Saturday evenings, July 2026
signals.reason: A magical, kid-friendly outdoor light and music show projecting Disney stories onto a water wall at the Singing Fountains.
signals.note: The Singing Fountains are a verified, family-friendly location in Plovdiv known for evening shows; kept as a plausible event.

signals.title: Festival of Fun for Children
signals.reason: Specifically curated for younger audiences with outdoor workshops, sports activities, and games at the green foot of Youth Hill.
signals.note: Plovdiv Stage Park at Youth Hill is a real venue that regularly hosts family-friendly outdoor festivals.

signals.title: International Folklore Festival Street Parade
signals.reason: Very colorful, lively open-air parades through the city center that are easy to watch with a toddler without sitting through a long stage show.
signals.note: The International Folklore Festival is a real recurring event in Plovdiv, and the street parades are suitable for a 4-year-old.

signals.title: Day Trip to Park-Island 'Svoboda' in Pazardzhik
signals.reason: Highly rated by the family; features fantastic playgrounds and a small zoo area, making it a perfect, easy day trip destination.
signals.note: Park-Island Svoboda is a real, well-known park with playgrounds and a small zoo in Pazardzhik, well within the 90-minute radius.

signals.title: Byala Reka Ecotrail Hike
signals.reason: A highly accessible, child-friendly trail of sturdy wooden bridges over a river, matching the family's preference for gentle, safe walks.
signals.note: The Byala Reka Ecotrail is a real, family-friendly trail with wooden bridges located within an 85-minute drive of Plovdiv.
